en: Begin with titles and dates, then compare materials and holding institutions.
Which details recur, and which details change?
zh-Hans: 先从标题和年代开始，再比较材料与收藏机构。
哪些细节反复出现，哪些地方发生了变化？

public_intro.en: Raja Deen Dayal (1844–1905) was an artist associated in these museum entries with south asia and practices such as photography, printmaking. The selection brings together 15 works. Begin with titles, dates, materials, and holding institutions, then compare what recurs and what changes across the works; these pages do not include local images.
public_intro.zh-Hans: Raja Deen Dayal（1844—1905）是一位与south asia相关的艺术家，作品中可见photography, printmaking等实践。这里选取15件作品；请从标题、年代和材料开始，寻找反复出现与发生变化的细节，页面暂不展示本地图像。
